name: vim-2 — Natural Movie fMRI (Gallant Lab)
description: BOLD fMRI from 3 participants viewing hours of natural movie trailers, released via CRCNS. A widely used benchmark for encoding/decoding models of dynamic natural vision and reconstruction of perceived movies.
citation: Nishimoto S, et al. (2011). Reconstructing visual experiences from brain activity evoked by natural movies. Current Biology, 21(19), 1641–1646.
